---
title: "Detailed LLM Disclosure"
author: "Nikolina Djogova"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
editor: visual
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

I am including the exact prompts I used while working on this project.

1.  I'm working on a data mining project and I am attaching my outline. What code can I run to make sure that my API keys will never get pushed to Git? Explain
2.  This is my 00_setup script. Evaluate it and tell me if i there's anything i need to get rid of or anything i can improve.
3.  After editing my R scripts, I need to close R in order to be able to then reopen it and push the code. If I simply want to push after writing the code, I can't see it.
4.  What's the best way to store an api key and why, explain.
5.  I'm trying to build a request url but I don't want the api key to show when I run it, what's the best way to hide it?
6.  This is my second script. Evaluate it, is there anything I can improve? Anything I should get rid of or any chance to simplify something?
7.  I'm trying to get package metadata and then the granules inside that package. Am I overcomplicating this? Can i write this code in a more simple way?
8.  My function returns error after error. Error during wrapup: URL using bad/illegal format or missing URL: URL rejected: No host part in the URL Error: no more error handlers available (recursive errors?); invoking 'abort' restart. Help me fix it.
9.  Inside the clean dataset I need to remove short entries, let's say less than 50 words. Help me with the code. This is what I have at the moment: dplyr::filter(word_count \< 50).
10. This is how my code is looking rn for creating a clean dataset. Is there something missing? Something I should add? remove?
11. I'm trying to create a wrapper and I can't get it right. Help me write wrappers for packages and granules. Here's what I have atm:
12. I'm about to run this code to collect the full data. Check it. Do you think it will work? Am i missing something?
13. After fI finally got the data, I fixed an earlier bug, ran the script and it is currently reloading everything again which is soo time consuming. What can I add to my code so that doesn't happen again? Explain.
14. I ran and collected a large part of the data but it just stopped. I need to continue but i don't want to re-run the whole thing just what's left. How do i do that?
15. My chunk files are saving, but I don't think they're in order. How can i cheeck is some are missing?
16. I want to save each chunk immediately so I don’t lose everything if the script stops midway.
17. I'm getting way too many NAs when collecting granules. What should i do to make sure they don't break the script??
18. My script is still running way tooo long, can i add progress messages or checkpoints so I can see where it is and make sure it's still working??
19. I want to make sure my script is reproducible before i push it to github. What should I remove, what should I keep, and what would make it look cleaner?
20. Here are my scripts 05 and 05b. I'm now working on 06 combining both together. How do i combine them together and keep the same structure??
21. I'm not sure what i should clean out in the final dataset combined.
22.
